description: A schema for a Total CMS Collection meta data file.
formgrid:
id id
name name
schema schema
description description
queueRebuildOnSave queueRebuildOnSave
---URL Setup---
url url
prettyUrl prettyUrl
---Dashboard Setup---
category labelPlural
sortBy labelSingular
reverseSort reverseSort
---Public Access---
publicOperations publicOperations
groups groups
---Overrides---
formSettings formSettings
properties properties
customProperties customProperties
---
count count

id.label: ID
id.help: The unique identifier for this collection.

schema.label: Schema
schema.help: The name of the schema that the collection objects conform to

url.label: Object Path or URL
url.help: The base url or path for objects stored in this collection.

prettyUrl.label: Pretty URLs
prettyUrl.help: Use pretty URLs for linking building to objects in this collection.

groups.label: File Access Groups
groups.help: Access Groups to control access to download/stream the collection files

publicOperations.label: Allow unauthenticated users to perform these operations on this collection

category.label: Category
category.help: Add a category to organize the collections in the side panel

labelPlural.label: Plural Label
labelPlural.help: Custom plural term for collection items (e.g. 'Posts', 'Articles'). Defaults to 'Objects' if not set.

labelSingular.label: Singular Label
labelSingular.help: Custom singular term for collection items (e.g. 'Post', 'Article'). Defaults to 'Object' if not set.

sortBy.label: Sort By
sortBy.help: The default property to sort the collection by in the collection view.

queueRebuildOnSave.label: Queue Rebuild Index on Save
queueRebuildOnSave.help: When enabled, saving objects will no longer trigger a rebuild of the index. This is useful for large collections.

count.label: Objects Created
count.help: Total number of objects that have been created in this collection.

formSettings.label: Object Form Settings
formSettings.help: Custom settings for the object creation/edit forms. Available options: helpStyle, helpOnHover, helpOnFocus, newActions, editActions, deleteActions

properties.help: Override schema property attributes for this collection.
properties.label: Form Field Overrides

customProperties.label: Object Form Overrides
customProperties.help: Custom values for the form fields for specific objects.
